dumped core

Hi there,

I'm not sure I'm addressing/naming this correctly. Please fix if necessary.

I'm currently using drm-61-kmod and gpu-firmware-amd-kmod-beige-goby from ports, but I also had this problem when using just drm-kmod package.

I'm facing OS crashes when using GIMP in sway (thus Xwayland). I haven't discovered a specific pattern; the crash simply happens after some short time of operation. I don't recall this happening under X11. I came across this more than half a year ago, I'm sorry to report this so late.

And I'm sorry to start so many sentences with "I" =/

Please see the attachment.
